tuto.actions:
Here is your hand of Agent cards. On your turn, you must play an Agent to perform one of these 3 actions:
• Recruit the Agent
• Develop a Technology
• Take Leadership
tuto.bonus-tokens: The first player to win an Influence disc earns <bold>the associated Bonus token</bold>.
tuto.bonus-tokens-tech: There are also 3 bonus tokens for the first player to reach level 2 of a Technology.
tuto.card-effects:
Agents cost from 1 to 10 Credits, and their effects are very varied.
At any time, click on a card to discover its effects.
tuto.discover-leadership: It's your turn. You will discover the 3rd and final action: <bold>Take Leadership</bold>.
tuto.discover-tech: It's your turn. Time to discover the 2nd action: <bold>develop a Technology</bold>.
tuto.discs: To win an <bold>Influence disc</bold>, you must push it all the way to the end of the track on your side.
tuto.draw-5: Now, you draw cards to have <bold>5</bold> in hand.
tuto.end-turn: At the end of your turn, you draw Agent cards until you have at least 4 cards.
tuto.end-turn-2: Your turn is over, you draw cards to have 4 in hand.
tuto.good-luck:
Now it's your turn to play: can you unite the solar system?
Good luck!
tuto.leader-badge:
The Leader Badge increases your hand size to 5. You will draw up to 5 cards at the end of your turn.
If you take the Leader Badge while you already have it, you flip it and your limit becomes 6 cards.
The Leader Badge is also a prerequisite for some Agent effects.
tuto.leader-badge-intro: When you take Leadership, the first effect is always to <bold>receive the Leader Badge</bold>.
tuto.leadership-activate: After clicking OK, choose <bold>Take Leadership</bold> in the action popup.
tuto.leadership-explain: To take Leadership, simply <bold>discard an Agent card</bold> and apply the effects shown on this board.
tuto.mobilize:
When you use an Animod to take Leadership, you also benefit from the "Mobilize 2" effect.
With this effect, you draw 2 Agent cards and place them directly in play.
tuto.mobilize-detail:
You don't pay the cost of mobilized cards, but you don't get their effects either!
It's still useful, because each card in play gives you a 1-credit discount on the next Agents of the same planet you recruit.
tuto.opponent-captures: Your opponent played this Agent. They gained the last Influence needed to win this Influence disc on Terra!
tuto.opponent-leader: With their Agent, your opponent also <bold>took the Leader Badge</bold> from you.
tuto.opponent-recruit: Your opponent has recruited this agent.
tuto.opponent-tech: Your opponent has developed this technology.
tuto.over:
Congratulations, you've completed the tutorial!
Ready to play with other players?
tuto.planets: In Zenith, you and your opponent compete to gain <bold>Influence</bold> on these 5 planets.
tuto.recruit: It's your turn. <bold>Recruit this Agent</bold> by placing it on your side of the Planet board, in its matching zone (Mars).
tuto.recruit.cost:
When you recruit an Agent, you must pay its cost in Credits.
You start the game with 12 Credits.
tuto.recruit.done: Great! The Mars influence disc has moved toward your side. Recruiting agents is the main way to gain influence on planets.
tuto.recruit.effects: After recruiting an Agent, <bold>you apply its effects</bold>.
tuto.recruit.influence: The first effect of an agent is always the same: <bold>gain 1 Influence</bold> on its planet.
tuto.recruit.zenithium:
The second effect of this agent gives you 2 Zenithium.
Zenithium is used to develop Technologies.
tuto.tech-boards:
Here is the Technology board. It changes every game.
In Zenith, there are 3 Factions: Animod , Human , and Robot .
Each Faction has its own Technology track.
tuto.tech-cumulative: Technologies cost more and more to develop, however you gain the effects of the level reached <bold>as well as all lower levels in the column</bold>!
tuto.tech-develop: After clicking OK, choose <bold>Develop Technology</bold> in the action popup.
tuto.tech-discard: Discard this card to develop Animod Technology.
tuto.tech-done: This level 1 Technology costs <bold>1 Zenithium</bold>. You gain 2 Credits.
tuto.tech-how:
To develop a technology, you must:
• Discard an Agent card of the matching Faction
• Pay the cost in Zenithium for the next Technology level (from 1 to 5)
tuto.victory:
You can win in 3 different ways:
• Absolute Victory: win 3 Influence discs from the same planet.
• Democratic Victory: win 4 Influence discs from strictly different planets.
• Popular Victory: win 5 Influence discs (from any combination of planets).
tuto.victory-recap: The game ends as soon as a player has <bold>3 identical planet discs</bold>, <bold>4 different discs</bold>, or <bold>5 discs</bold>. That player wins the game.
help.develop.lowest: Develop the least advanced technology (pay its cost)
option.secret-agent.help: Add 10 new Secret Agent cards to the game
extension.title: Secret Agent
extension.intro: This game includes the Secret Agent expansion!
extension.setup.title: Setup
extension.setup.desc: The 10 new Secret Agent cards are shuffled into the Agent deck.
extension.new.title: New agents
extension.new.desc: 5 agents have a cost of 0 credits. The other 5 cost 5 credits and their effects take into account the opponent's resources (leader badge, credits, zenithium).
